---
name: Documentation Update
about: Request documentation updates or improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: ['documentation']
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Need

**What documentation needs to be updated or created?**

A clear description of the documentation requirement.

## Current State

**What documentation currently exists?**

Describe what documentation is currently available and any gaps.

## Desired State

**What should the documentation include?**

Describe what the updated or new documentation should contain.

## Target Audience

**Who is the intended audience for this documentation?**

- [ ] Developers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] API consumers
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Documentation Type

**What type of documentation is needed?**

- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User guide
- [ ] Developer guide
- [ ] Architecture documentation
- [ ] Setup/installation guide
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] README updates
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Content Requirements

**What specific content should be included?**

- Key concepts to explain
- Examples needed
- Code samples required
- Diagrams or screenshots
- Step-by-step instructions

## Priority

- [ ] High (Critical for user adoption)
- [ ] Medium (Important for development)
- [ ] Low (Nice to have)

## Estimated Effort

- [ ] Small (1-2 hours)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 hours)
- [ ] Large (1-2 days)
- [ ] Epic (3+ days)

## Additional Context

**Any other relevant information?**

Add any context, links, or references that might be helpful.
